steps: Add 200 g, flour and 1 tsp, baking powder into a medium-sized bowl.
Mix the dry ingredients well. Flour and baking power well mixed together.
Mash the bananas with a fork. Mashing bananas with a fork. Mashed banana.
Transfer the mashed banana into another medium-sized bowl.
Add 60 g, oil , 100 g, maple syrup , and 0.5 tsp, vanilla extract to the mashed banana.
Mix all the wet ingredients well.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix everything. Be sure to not overmix as overmixing will cause the banana bread to be less fluffy. All ingredients mixed together.
Grease a baking pan with a neutral oil of your choice.
Fill the dough into the baking pan.
Bake the banana bread at 350 °C for 00:40:00 . Ready banana bread.
Let the banana bread cool down a bit before serving.
aDecorate the banana bread with pecans. Banana bread dough in baking pan, decorated with pecans.
creator: Anita Broellochs
